_meta.name: English
app.title: DedrisGenAI — AI Image Studio
mode.label: Interface
mode.advanced.tip: Show every model, advanced and image-input control
lang.label: Language
settings.label: Settings
settings.title: Settings
demo.title: Examples — Style gallery
demo.intro: These samples showcase the styles and looks DedrisGenAI can produce. Pick one you like and click “Try this style” to open the studio with it preselected.
demo.error: Could not load the style gallery. Make sure the engine is running.
api.title: API
api.intro: Every endpoint below is reachable on this site at the same origin. Calls go through the DedrisGenAI PHP proxy — your browser never talks to the engine directly. Copy a ready-made curl snippet, or hit Run to try it from your browser.
api.invalid_json: Invalid JSON in the request body — fix it and try again.
preset.label: Generative Model
engine.title: Engine status
banner.engine.starting: The generation engine is starting up — this can take a minute on first launch.
banner.engine.unreachable: Cannot reach the generation engine. Is it running? Restart the launcher if this persists.
banner.engine.notreachable.generate: The engine is not reachable. Make sure it has finished starting, then try again.
banner.options.limited: Loaded a limited set of options — the engine did not return its full configuration.
banner.preset.failed: Could not load the "{name}" preset from the engine. Using current settings.
banner.contact.lost: Lost contact with the engine while generating. Retrying…
banner.task.resumed: Reconnected to the generation that was running before the page reloaded.
banner.task.lost: The previous generation is no longer available (the engine may have restarted).
model.downloading: Downloading model… (first use of this preset)
field.prompt.ph: Describe what you want to see…
estimate.firstrun: · first image also loads the model (~+{load}s)
panel.text.desc: Pure text-to-image generation using the prompt and settings on this page. Switch tabs to feed an input image.
uov.intro: Upload an image, set the prompt, choose how strongly to vary it, then press Generate to get fresh variations of your image.
uov.upload: Drop or click to upload the source image
uov.need_image: Upload a source image first, then press Generate.
uov.paint_hint: Upload a source image first, then press Generate.
uov.drop: Drop or click to upload an image to upscale / vary
uov.note: Wired when the engine exposes upscale / vary input. Until then this is non-blocking.
ip.drop: Drop or click to upload a reference image
ip.note: Wired when the engine exposes image-prompt input.
ip.intro: Upload one or two reference images, choose how each one guides the result (Image Prompt, PyraCanny, CPDS or FaceSwap), set the prompt and press Generate.
ip.upload: Drop or click to upload a reference image
ip.need_image: Upload at least one reference image first, then press Generate.
inpaint.drop: Drop or click to upload the image to edit
inpaint.upload: Drop or click to upload the image to edit
inpaint.title: Edit Image
inpaint.intro: Upload an image, paint over the area you want to change, then describe what should appear there and press Generate. Only the painted area is regenerated — the rest of the image stays the same.
inpaint.mode.content: Modify Content (add objects, change background, etc.)
inpaint.paint_hint: Paint over the area you want to regenerate before generating.
inpaint.canvas_hint: Paint the area to regenerate. Hold and drag over the image.
inpaint.note: Paint the region to regenerate, then add an optional prompt and Generate.
describe.drop: Drop or click to upload an image to describe
describe.note: Wired when the engine exposes the describe endpoint.
describe.intro: Upload an image and let DedrisGenAI write a prompt that describes it. The suggested prompt is placed in the prompt box, ready to generate.
describe.upload: Drop or click to upload an image to describe
describe.done: Prompt written from the image — added to the prompt box.
describe.need_image: Upload an image to describe first.
enhance.intro: Upload an image, type what part to detect (e.g. face), describe how to improve it, then Generate. It finds that region and regenerates it.
enhance.note: This needs the SAM / detection models, which download on first use and may be limited on some cloud GPUs.
enhance.upload: Drop or click to upload the image to enhance
enhance.need_image: Upload an image to enhance first, then press Generate.
enhance.need_detection: Type the part to detect (e.g. face), then press Generate.
metadata.drop: Drop or click to upload an image to read its generation metadata
metadata.note: Reads DedrisGenAI / A1111 metadata embedded in an image. Wired when the engine exposes it.
metadata.intro: Upload an image that DedrisGenAI created to read back the prompt, model and settings used, and load them into the controls on this page.
metadata.upload: Drop or click to upload an image to read its parameters
metadata.none: No DedrisGenAI metadata found in this image.
metadata.need_image: Upload an image to read first.
lora.add.title: Add LoRA from URL
lora.what: A LoRA is a small add-on that teaches the model a specific style, character or concept. Add one or more on top of the base model to steer the look. Use SDXL-family LoRAs (SDXL 1.0 / Pony / Illustrious / NoobAI) — SD 1.5 LoRAs are not compatible with this engine.
results.placeholder: Your generated images will appear here.
results.firstrun: First run note: the very first generation downloads and loads the model and may take several minutes. Later generations are much faster.
results.title: Results
progress.loading_model: Loading model (first run can take a few minutes)…
progress.no_task: No task_id returned by the engine.
